notes: Portable n100 selected-row archive. Strict parser replay fails only warpsock_native GET p50 and p95 versus quiche_direct.
This file exists so current_rows_high_water.py and current_rows_awsdev.sh use an explicit repo-owned high-water artifact rather than falling back to embedded defaults.
